CustomField.description: When true, NeuraFormLogic.updateJSON writes the renderer snapshot into Form_Template_Snapshot__c chunk rows (unbounded size) instead of the legacy Questions_JSON__c[_1_2] / *_Conditions__c fields. The renderer prefers v2 when present, falling back to the legacy fields otherwise. Disable_Form_Template_JSON_Trigger__c still suppresses all snapshot generation as the master kill switch. See docs/snapshot-v2.md.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Routes form-template snapshot writes through the chunked Form_Template_Snapshot__c child object so payloads can exceed the legacy 393K cap. Required for large compliance audits (Steritech-scale).
CustomField.label: Snapshot V2 Enabled
